name: Forest Ranger Services: Episode 1
short_description: Horror game series about the investigation of missing hikers in the U.S. National Parks. Follow the story of a wannabe reporter who got a job as a ranger to investigate the disappearances - several episodes that tell one story! Based on true events.
detailed_description:
ONE STORY THROUGH MULTIPLE EPISODES - LIKE A TV SHOW!

Story that unfolds across multiple episodes, each with new mysteries and thrilling twists and explanations of what's happening. You play as the same character in all episodes, but sometimes you may play as side characters in the story.

Start your journey in Episode 1 by exploring atmospheric locations and piecing together the start of the narrative of Forest Ranger Services.

EXAMINE YOUR SURROUNDINGS

Explore the levels and find details, lore and clues - Try to figure out the plot of the series.

DRIVE

Go for a ride in a forest and listen to a radio station podcast about missing hikers and UFOs all based on facts, documented reports and real life events.

YOU ARE THE MAIN CHARACTER OF THE SERIES!

Experience the events that start the Forest Ranger Services series where you are the main character. Find all the clues in the first episode.

  • Piece together the creepy start of the series - a non-linear story!

  • Talk to strange individuals - meet some of the main characters and follow their story through the episodes!

  • Casual driving with a twist!

The Forest Ranger Services series are based on real life events and personal accounts of hikers. The narrative has been altered for entertainment purposes.

There are thousands of missing reports filed each year in the U.S National Parks. Many cases remain unexplained.
